propertySets.name: Pset_DistributionPortCommon
propertySets.definition: Common attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

properties.name: PortNumber
properties.definition: The port index for logically ordering the port within the containing element or element type.

properties.name: ColourCode
properties.definition: Name of a colour for identifying the connector, if applicable.

propertySets.name: Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryCable
propertySets.definition: Log of electrical activity attached to an instance of IfcPerformanceHistory having an assigned IfcDistributionPort of type CABLE.

propertySets.name: Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryDuct
propertySets.definition: Fluid flow performance history attached to an instance of IfcPerformanceHistory assigned to IfcDistributionPort. This replaces the deprecated IfcFluidFlowProperties for performance values.

propertySets.name: Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryPipe
propertySets.definition: Log of substance usage attached to an instance of IfcPerformanceHistory having an assigned IfcDistributionPort of type PIPE.

propertySets.name: Pset_DistributionPortTypeCable
propertySets.definition: Cable port occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

properties.name: ElectricalConnectionType
properties.definition: The physical port connection:ACPLUG: AC plug DCPLUG: DC plug CRIMP: bare wire

properties.name: ConnectionSubtype
properties.definition: The physical port connection subtype that further qualifies the ConnectionType. The following values are recommended:ACPLUG: A, B, C, D, E, F, EF, G, H, I, J, K, L, M DIN: Mini3P, Mini4P, Mini5P, Mini6P, Mini7P, Mini8P, Mini9P DSub: DA15, DB25, DC37, DD50, DE9, DE15 EIAJ: RC5720 HDMI: A, B, C RADIO: IEEE802.11g, IEEE802.11n RJ: 4P4C, 6P2C, 8P8C SOCKET: E-11, E-12, E-14, E-17, E-26, E-27, E-39, E-40 TRS: TS_Mini, TS_SubMini, TRS_Mini, TRS_SubMini

properties.name: ConnectionGender
properties.definition: The physical connection gender.

properties.name: ConductorFunction
properties.definition: Indicates function of the conductors to which the load is connected. Where L1, L2 and L3 represent the phase lines according to IEC 60446 notation (sometimes phase lines may be referenced by color [Red, Blue, Yellow] or by number [1, 2, 3] etc). Protective Earth is sometimes also known as CPC or common protective conductor. Note that for an electrical device, a set of line conductor functions may be applied.

properties.name: CurrentContent3rdHarmonic
properties.definition: The ratio between the third harmonic current and the phase current.

properties.name: Current
properties.definition: The actual current and operable range.

properties.name: Voltage
properties.definition: The actual voltage and operable range.

properties.name: Power
properties.definition: The actual power and operable range.

properties.name: Protocols
properties.definition: For data ports, identifies the protocols used as defined by the Open System Interconnection (OSI) Basic Reference Model (ISO 7498). Layers include: 1. Physical; 2. DataLink; 3. Network; 4. Transport; 5. Session; 6. Presentation; 7. Application. Example: 3:IP, 4:TCP, 5:HTTP

properties.name: HasConnector
properties.definition: Indicate whether the wire pair end point is terminated with a connector or not.

properties.name: IsWelded
properties.definition: Indicates whether the wire pair end point is joined to another wire pair end point by means of a welded junction.

propertySets.name: Pset_DistributionPortTypeDuct
propertySets.definition: Duct port occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

properties.name: ConnectionType
properties.definition: The end-style treatment of the port.

properties.name: ConnectionSubtype
properties.definition: The physical port connection subtype that further qualifies the ConnectionType.

properties.name: NominalWidth
properties.definition: The nominal overall width of the object. The size information is provided in addition to the shape representation and the geometric parameters used within. In cases of inconsistency between the geometric parameters and the size properties, provided in the attached property set, the geometric parameters take precedence.

properties.name: NominalHeight
properties.definition: The nominal height of the object. The size information is provided in addition to the shape representation and the geometric parameters used within. In cases of inconsistency between the geometric parameters and the size properties, provided in the attached property set, the geometric parameters take precedence. The nominal height of the duct connection. Only provided for rectangular shaped ducts.

properties.name: NominalThickness
properties.definition: The nominal thickness of the object. The size information is provided in addition to the shape representation and the geometric parameters used within. In case of inconsistency between the geometric parameters and the size properties, provided in the attached property set, the geometric parameters take precedence.

properties.name: DryBulbTemperature
properties.definition: Dry bulb temperature of the object. Indicates dry bulb temperature of the air.

properties.name: WetBulbTemperature
properties.definition: Wet bulb temperature of the air.

properties.name: VolumetricFlowRate
properties.definition: The volumetric flow rate of the fluid.

properties.name: Velocity
properties.definition: The velocity of the fluid.

properties.name: Pressure
properties.definition: The pressure of fluid.

propertySets.name: Pset_DistributionPortTypePipe
propertySets.definition: Pipe port occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

properties.name: ConnectionType
properties.definition: The end-style treatment of the port.

properties.name: ConnectionSubtype
properties.definition: The physical port connection subtype that further qualifies the ConnectionType.

properties.name: NominalDiameter
properties.definition: Nominal diameter or width of the object. The nominal diameter of the pipe connection.

properties.name: InnerDiameter
properties.definition: The actual inner diameter of the object.

properties.name: OuterDiameter
properties.definition: The actual outer diameter of the object.

properties.name: Temperature
properties.definition: Temperature of the fluid.

properties.name: VolumetricFlowRate
properties.definition: The volumetric flow rate of the fluid.

properties.name: MassFlowRate
properties.definition: The mass flow rate of the fluid.

properties.name: FlowCondition
properties.definition: Defines the flow condition as a percentage of the cross-sectional area.

properties.name: Velocity
properties.definition: The velocity of the fluid.

properties.name: Pressure
properties.definition: The pressure of fluid.

propertySets.name: Pset_WiredCommunicationPortCommon
propertySets.definition: Properties used for wired communication port.

properties.name: CommunicationStandard
properties.definition: Indicates the communication standard supported by the physical wired communication port.

properties.name: MaximumTransferRate
properties.definition: Indicates the transmission rate in bit/s over the wired port.
